hooks.command: CONFIG_FILE=~/.claude/plugins/config/cc-investigation/team-profile.md; ACTIVE_CASES=$(ls -d cases/*/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l); if [ -f "$CONFIG_FILE" ] && ! grep -q '\[PLACEHOLDER\]' "$CONFIG_FILE"; then echo "[cc-investigation] 调查工具包已加载。"; [ "$ACTIVE_CASES" -gt 0 ] && echo "[cc-investigation] 当前目录有 $ACTIVE_CASES 个案件，运行 /investigate list 查看" || echo "[cc-investigation] 运行 /investigate new 启动新案件"; else echo "[cc-investigation] 首次使用? 运行 /cc-investigation:cold-start-interview 完成设置"; fi

SessionStart.description: Check config status, count active cases, give actionable prompt

hooks.command: case $(pwd) in */cases/*) echo "[cc-investigation] 案件文件操作 — 检查: 1) 文件名带序号前缀(01_) 2) 多版本文件带日期后缀(_YYYYMMDD) 3) 文件头尾有关联索引" ;; esac

PreToolUse.description: Remind naming conventions only when editing case files
